title: Compare Two Numbers
description: Create a variable 'a' with value 10 and 'b' with value 20. Print whether a is greater than b (as a boolean), then print whether a is less than b (as a boolean). Each on its own line.
starter_code: # Create your variables and comparisons here

code_requirements.fail_message: Create a variable called 'a' with the value 10.
Create a variable called 'b' with the value 20.
Use comparison operators (> and <) to compare a and b instead of hardcoding the boolean values.

hints: Create two variables: a = 10 and b = 20
Use the > operator to check if a is greater than b, and the < operator to check if a is less than b
Wrap each comparison in a print() function call
